Entity.name: 30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance
Entity.commentInRDBMS: Contingent encumbrance refers to the additional assets which may need to be encumbered when the reporting institutions faces adverse developments triggered by an external event over which the reporting institution has no control (including a downgrade, decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets or a general loss of confidence). In these cases, the reporting institution will need to encumber additional assets as a consequence of already existing transactions. The additional amount of encumbered assets shall be net of the impact of the institution’s hedge transactions against the events described under the aforementioned stressed scenarios. (Annext 17 (Asset Encumbrance) 4. Part C)

Attribute.name: 30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance reference date
Attribute.comment: The date the data refers to.

Attribute.name: 30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance reporting agent identifier
30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance accounting consolidation level
Attribute.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Attribute.name: 30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance accounting standard
Selected financial liabilities additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Selected financial liabilities additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the selected financial liabilities encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Deposits additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Deposits additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are deposits by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Debt securities issued additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Debt securities issued additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Debt securities issued as covered bonds additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Debt securities issued as covered bonds additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as covered bonds by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Debt securities issued as securitisations additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Debt securities issued as securitisations additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as securitisations by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Other sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Other sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Other sources of encumbrance by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Attribute.name: Total sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount
Attribute.comment: Total sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

identifier.name: 30% Fair value decrease contingent encumbrance PK
